archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) with touches of Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury)
design_philosophy: A highly functional yet premium internal tool for a jewelry shop. The design prioritizes data clarity and high contrast while maintaining an elegant, high-end feel suitable for a luxury business. The layout features a split-screen or dual-column approach: an efficient data entry form on one side, and a live, print-ready invoice preview on the other.

hierarchy.overline: text-xs uppercase tracking-widest font-body font-semibold text-muted-foreground

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing. The application should feel breathable. The main interface should feature a sidebar/form column and a large live preview column.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 transition-all duration-200 rounded-sm font-body px-6 py-2 h-auto shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 transition-all duration-200 rounded-sm font-body px-6 py-2 h-auto
buttons.accent: bg-accent text-accent-foreground hover:bg-accent/90 transition-all duration-200 rounded-sm font-body px-6 py-2 h-auto shadow-sm

inputs.default: border-border bg-transparent focus:ring-1 focus:ring-ring focus:border-ring rounded-sm font-body h-10 px-3 transition-colors
inputs.label: text-sm font-medium leading-none peer-disabled:cursor-not-allowed peer-disabled:opacity-70 mb-2 block

cards.default: bg-card border border-border shadow-sm rounded-md overflow-hidden
cards.invoice_paper: bg-white border border-border shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.08)] p-10 min-h-[842px] max-w-[595px] mx-auto aspect-[1/1.414]

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Subtle opacity shifts and minimal scaling. Borders darken on hover for inputs.
motion_and_interactions.data_fetch: Fade in fetched data fields with a slight upward translation (e.g., framer-motion initial opacity 0, y 10, animate opacity 1, y 0) to highlight the successful retrieval.

image_urls.description: Modern jewelry store interior, can be used lightly as a blurred background or in empty states/auth screens.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA/WCAG AA standards. Input borders must have sufficient contrast.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have a visible focus ring (`focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a dual-pane layout: Left pane for data entry (Form), Right pane for live Invoice Preview (styled like A4 paper).
Integrate Google Fonts: Cormorant Garamond (Heading) and Outfit (Body). Add to Tailwind config.
The Form should have fields: Stock Card Number (with a 'Fetch' button next to it), Customer Name, Sales Person Name, Description, Discount (amount/percent), VAT toggle.
Auto-calculate the Discount Percentage if amount is entered, or vice versa.
VAT toggle must automatically add 18% to the final total.
The Live Preview must instantly reflect the form's state and fetched data (Item, Metal, Metal Type, Diamond Type, Diamond Clarity, Diamond CTS, CS Type, CS CTS, Stock Price).

Format the Invoice Preview cleanly: Header with generic Jewelry Shop logo/name, Date/Time, Invoice Number. Body with customer info. A structured table for item details. Subtotal, Discount, VAT, and Total at the bottom. Signature line at the very end.
Use standard `window.print()` triggered by a 'Print Invoice' button. Use CSS `@media print` to hide the form and sidebar, expanding the invoice to full width/height.
Include a 'Save & Email Manager' button that handles Firebase submission (mocked or actual if setup) and simulates emailing.
